projects.name: Knowledge Base Expansion (rhinobase + iboisbase)
projects.summary: Build rhinobase (RhinoCommon fluency) + iboisbase (IBOIS timber craft). 4 phases, 8 agents max, ~4 hrs.

projects.name: Knowledge Feedback Loop (medical guidelines model)
projects.summary: Add case_notes tables to bases, wire /rhino-review to write there. ~1.5 hrs + piggyback on modeling sessions.

projects.name: Open Source AEC Study
projects.summary: Study COMPAS, Ladybug, HdM Calc/Rhyton, openLCA — extract patterns for our knowledge system. License-aware: MIT usable, unlicensed = patterns only.

projects.name: Fabrication Bridge — Supply Chain + Ecological Impact
projects.summary: Connect design → sourcing → transport → fabrication → assembly → verification as a traceable, ecologically quantified chain. Roundwood as material passport. Per-lock supply chain comparison.

projects.name: Rennaz Lock 07 — Construction-Ready Bridge Lock
projects.summary: First lock with full archibase knowledge. LOG 400 / LOD 400 timber bridge lock. 4 modelers + lead, ~450 objects. Phase 0 (spec) complete, Phase 1-4 runs overnight autonomously.

projects.name: Kitchen Analogy Animation (midterm presentation)
projects.priority: midterm — due March 30, screen test March 27
projects.summary: 6-scene pixel art RPG animation. Blender character sprites + HTML environments. Storyboard locked. Phase 0: Andrea finishes character models.
